summary: Plan-mode PR inventory classification for 10 listed candidates. Security-sensitive PRs are quarantined with route_security. Already-closed candidate #75472 is kept closed. Remaining open non-security PRs are kept as independent or related open work because this shard is not a dedupe cluster and merge/fix/close paths are either blocked by job permissions, failed proof/checks, or missing merge preflight.

actions.reason: Security-boundary-shaped exec policy changes are out of ProjectClownfish backlog cleanup scope.
Keep as related open work; it has a plausible focused patch but still needs proof/check repair before any merge or fixed-by-candidate closeout.
Already closed in live preflight state; no closure action is valid.
Unique channel behavior fix candidate; keep open rather than close or merge from this inventory shard.
Security-boundary-shaped Signal self-chat ingress changes are routed to central OpenClaw security handling even though the PR is already closed.
Distinct QQBot availability fix candidate; no clear duplicate or superseding canonical is hydrated.
Diagnostic payload/log retention changes are security-sensitive enough for central handling and are out of this cleanup shard.
Keep as related open cron fix work; not enough authority or proof to close or merge in this shard.
Keep as independent candidate for maintainer review; no close or merge path is available in plan mode.
Keep as related open fix candidate for #76638; fixed-by-candidate closeout is blocked by failing checks and disabled post-merge closure.
